# Harness, Not Committee V2

This pack does not require a committee to approve every ad.

It requires a harness that makes the agent execute with structure.

## Committee behavior to avoid

- waiting for meetings,
- debating abstract strategy,
- rewriting copy forever,
- demanding certainty before tests,
- using approval as procrastination.

## Harness behavior to enforce

- product facts loaded,
- buyer state diagnosed,
- tactic selected,
- proof path created,
- budget envelope set,
- measurement plan created,
- launch packet produced,
- results written back.

A committee slows the loop. A harness strengthens the loop.
